title: Music-Social App Profile
description: Profile schema for music-social domain projects. Provides context to the AI agent about the app, its matching mechanics, streaming integrations, social features, monetization model, and KPI targets.

languages.title: Supported Languages
languages.description: Languages the app is available in

growth_stage.title: Growth Stage
growth_stage.description: Current stage of the app lifecycle

supported_services.title: Supported Streaming Services
supported_services.description: Which streaming services the app integrates with

primary_service.title: Primary Streaming Service
primary_service.description: The most-used streaming service by the user base

currently_playing_enabled.title: Currently Playing Feature
currently_playing_enabled.description: Whether the app detects and displays what users are currently listening to

in_app_playback.title: In-App Playback
in_app_playback.description: Whether users can play music within the app (vs opening the streaming service)

free_tier_limitations.title: Free Tier Limitations
free_tier_limitations.description: What features are limited for users with free streaming accounts (e.g., 'Cannot play full tracks, shuffle only')

matching_algorithm.title: Matching Algorithm Basis
matching_algorithm.description: What the matching is based on (e.g., 'shared listening history, genre preferences, favorite artists')

swipe_based.title: Swipe-Based Matching
swipe_based.description: Whether the app uses swipe left/right mechanics

daily_swipe_limit.title: Daily Swipe Limit (Free Users)
daily_swipe_limit.description: Maximum swipes per day for free users (0 = unlimited)

chat_types.title: Chat Types
chat_types.description: Types of messages users can send

has_artist_rooms.title: Has Artist Rooms
has_artist_rooms.description: Virtual listening rooms where users listen together

premium_features.title: Premium-Exclusive Features
premium_features.description: Features locked behind the premium subscription (e.g., 'See who liked you', 'Unlimited swipes', 'Gender preference filter')

has_sponsored_content.title: Has Sponsored Content
has_sponsored_content.description: Whether the app shows sponsored tracks, playlists, or artist rooms

dau_mau_ratio.title: DAU/MAU Ratio Target
dau_mau_ratio.description: Target daily-to-monthly active user ratio (social app benchmark: 20-30%)

d1_retention.title: D1 Retention Target (%)
d1_retention.description: Target day-1 retention rate (social app benchmark: 25-40%)

d7_retention.title: D7 Retention Target (%)
d7_retention.description: Target day-7 retention rate (social app benchmark: 10-20%)

match_rate.title: Match Rate Target (%)
match_rate.description: Target mutual match rate per right swipe (benchmark: 5-15%)

match_to_chat_rate.title: Match-to-Chat Rate Target (%)
match_to_chat_rate.description: Target percentage of matches that result in a conversation (benchmark: 30-50%)
